repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: AMPK activation → mTOR inhibition → reduced cancer cell proliferation
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Diabetic patients on metformin show 30% lower cancer incidence in observational studies

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Insulin sensitization → reduced androgen production
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Restores ovulation in 50-60% of PCOS patients

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: AMPK activation → reduced hepatic lipogenesis
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Significant reduction in liver enzyme levels in T2DM-NAFLD patients

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Improved insulin signalling in brain → reduced tau phosphorylation
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Epidemiological evidence of lower dementia risk in metformin users

metformin.india_market_relevance: High — PCOS and cancer indications have large Indian patient populations

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Vasodilation of peripheral vessels → reduced vasospasm
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Reduces frequency and severity of Raynaud's attacks

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Vasodilation of pulmonary vasculature in vasoreactive patients
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Effective in the ~10% of PAH patients who are vasoreactive on testing

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Calcium channel blockade → prevents cerebral vasospasm
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Nimodipine (similar class) already approved; amlodipine being explored

amlodipine.india_market_relevance: Medium — Raynaud's uncommon in India; PAH niche market

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory pleiotropic effects
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Pleiotropic anti-inflammatory effects independent of LDL lowering

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Immunomodulation + neuroprotection via anti-inflammatory pathways
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: MS-STAT trial showed slowing of brain atrophy with high-dose simvastatin

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory, anti-thrombotic, antiviral properties
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Statin use associated with reduced COVID-19 severity in multiple cohort studies

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Promotes osteoblast activity via mevalonate pathway inhibition
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Animal studies show increased bone mineral density

atorvastatin.india_market_relevance: Medium — COVID and MS indications relevant; bone density in aging population

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Acid suppression improves antibiotic efficacy at gastric pH
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Essential component of H. pylori eradication regimens worldwide

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Sustained acid suppression → reduced metaplasia progression
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: High-dose PPI + aspirin reduced neoplastic progression in Barrett's

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Acid suppression protects gastric mucosa from NSAID/steroid damage
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Reduces NSAID-induced ulcer incidence by >80%

omeprazole.india_market_relevance: Very High — H. pylori prevalence >70% in India; NSAID co-prescription very common

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Reduces intraglomerular pressure → slows CKD progression
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Reduces proteinuria and slows GFR decline in diabetic patients

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: RAAS modulation in CNS → reduced migraine frequency
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Lisinopril reduced migraine frequency by 50% in placebo-controlled trial

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: RAAS blockade in severe systemic sclerosis
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: ACE inhibitors are first-line treatment for scleroderma renal crisis

lisinopril.india_market_relevance: High — Diabetic nephropathy burden is enormous in India

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Prostaglandin synthesis inhibition (alternative to indomethacin/ibuprofen)
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: IV/oral paracetamol effective in closing PDA in premature infants with better safety profile

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Synergistic analgesia reduces opioid requirements by 20-30%
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: IV paracetamol reduces morphine consumption in post-surgical patients

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Fever reduction → reduces delirium from hyperthermia
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Fever control may reduce ICU delirium incidence

paracetamol.india_market_relevance: High — PDA is significant neonatal concern; IV paracetamol growing in Indian ICUs

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory properties independent of antibiotic effect
repurposing_opportunities.clinical_stage: Approved for long-term prophylaxis in CF
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Reduces pulmonary exacerbations in CF patients by 40%

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Immunomodulatory + antibiofilm effects in chronic lung disease
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Long-term azithromycin reduces exacerbations in non-CF bronchiectasis

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory effects on skin microbiome
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Comparable to doxycycline in some rosacea trials

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Anti-malarial activity; synergy with chloroquine/quinine
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Azithromycin + chloroquine effective for P. vivax malaria

azithromycin.india_market_relevance: High — CF rare but bronchiectasis common; malaria relevant in endemic Indian regions

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Acid suppression prevents stress-induced GI bleeding
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Reduces stress ulcer bleeding in mechanically ventilated patients

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Potent acid suppression for gastrin-secreting tumour management
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Controls hypersecretion in Zollinger-Ellison syndrome effectively

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Acid-suppressive mechanism may independently reduce eosinophil infiltration
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: PPI-responsive EoE subset identified — histological remission in ~35%

pantoprazole.india_market_relevance: Very High — ICU stress ulcer prophylaxis and H. pylori dual role highly relevant

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: H1 blockade reduces pruritus-itch cycle
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Reduces itch scores in atopic dermatitis; ETAC study showed possible preventive effect

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Uptitraton to 4x standard dose shows additional benefit
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: High-dose cetirizine effective in antihistamine-refractory urticaria

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: H1/H2 antagonism may modulate COVID-19 cytokine response
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Small observational studies suggest reduced COVID-19 severity; requires RCT

cetirizine.india_market_relevance: High — Atopic dermatitis and urticaria burden significant in Indian population

repurposing_opportunities.new_indication: Primary Prevention in Low-Risk Individuals (JUPITER trial)
repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: LDL + CRP reduction in individuals with elevated hsCRP
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: JUPITER trial: 44% reduction in cardiovascular events in elevated hsCRP patients

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects on renal tubules
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Reduces contrast-induced nephropathy in high-risk patients

repurposing_opportunities.new_indication: Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction (HFpEF)
repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Pleiotropic anti-fibrotic effects on myocardium
repurposing_opportunities.clinical_stage: Phase III (CORONA trial — negative for systolic HF)
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Ongoing investigation for HFpEF subgroup which may differ from systolic HF

repurposing_opportunities.mechanism: Potent LDL reduction in paediatric patients
repurposing_opportunities.key_finding: Safe and effective in paediatric FH; approved by FDA for ages 8+

rosuvastatin.india_market_relevance: High — FH under-diagnosed in India; AKI prevention relevant in contrast-heavy cardiac cath labs
